title: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for period from Nov. 2001 to 02
description: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for period from Nov. 2001 to 02
text: REGD. NO. D.L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II —Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 571] NEWPELH1, THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 8, 2001/KARTIKA17,1923 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th November, 2001 G.S.R. 839(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 8 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange & Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) G.S.R. 738(E) dated 14th December, 1998, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board consisting of :— (i) Hon'bleMr. Justice D.K. Jain, Chairman, (ii) Hon'ble Mr. Justice Vijender Jain, Member, (iii) Hon'bleMr. Justice S.K. Marian,Member. 2. This notification shall come into force with effect from 10th day of November, 2001. [F. No. 674/1/2001-Cus. VIII] INDIRA MURTHY, Under Secy. Footnote:—The notification G.S.R. 738(E) dated 14th December, 1998 was published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) Part II, Section 3, Sub- section(i) on the 14th day of December, 1998. 3481 GI/2001 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press , Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
